parameters.query: DELETE FROM pending_alerts WHERE fired_at < NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
SELECT id, source, severity, title, body, url_hash, fired_at FROM pending_alerts WHERE read_at IS NULL AND fired_at > NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR ORDER BY fired_at DESC LIMIT 50

parameters.jsCode:
const alerts = $input.all().map(i => i.json).filter(a => a.id);
return [{ json: { alerts } }];
return [{ json: { success: true, acknowledged: $('Ack Prep').first().json.count } }];

parameters.query: ALTER TABLE pending_alerts ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS pushed_at TIMESTAMP NULL
SELECT id, source, severity, title, body, url_hash FROM pending_alerts WHERE pushed_at IS NULL AND fired_at > NOW() - INTERVAL 2 HOUR ORDER BY fired_at DESC LIMIT 20
